vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding the current state of the biome. P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but appears devoid of foliage. P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) contains a single, struggling specimen. P2 and P4 are not clearly distinguishable as separate entities; the black pot appears to contain only a single, failing vine.

inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No distinct silver guest specimen)

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains a single, etiolated vine with one leaf remaining. The white rabbit anchor is present.
plant_audit.Soil_Surface: Presence of crushed eggshells (calcium amendment) observed in P3.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears consistently dark and potentially over-saturated or lacking drainage.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshells present in P3. External desk surface contains a small electronic component (IC chip) in early images, which is removed in later frames.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Stable; the vine in P3 maintains a consistent, slightly drooping posture.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_CURRENT: Significant decline; the vine in P3 has lost turgor and appears to be collapsing into the soil medium.
temporal_deltas.External_Environment: The electronic component (IC chip) was removed from the desk surface between T-3 and T-2.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The lack of foliage in P1 and the severe etiolation/collapse of the specimen in P3 suggest poor light conditions (despite the LED) and likely root-zone failure due to moisture management issues.

anomalies.intervention: Introduction of crushed eggshells as a soil amendment.
anomalies.object_removal: Removal of an electronic component from the desk surface.

vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical collection is suffering from a lack of viable specimens. The yellow pot (P1) is effectively a dead zone. The black pot (P3) contains a single, struggling vine that has shown a marked loss of vitality over the 5-day observation period. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation, but the lack of structural integrity in the remaining plant indicates a failure to thrive.
